mapper.sql: privateClassOrderId, openId, userId, privateClassId, coachId, coachName, buyCount, orderType, imgUrl, orderNo, transactionNo, paySum, payType, realPayment, status, classTime, createdDate, payTime, finish, validityDate, storeAddrId, storeName, classDate,price, duration, className
mapper.insert: insert into private_class_order (privateClassOrderId, openId, userId, privateClassId, coachId, coachName, buyCount, orderType, imgUrl, orderNo, transactionNo, paySum, payType, realPayment, status, classTime,storeAddrId,storeName, classDate,createdDate, payTime, finish,price,className validityDate) values (#{privateClassOrderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{openId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{privateClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{coachName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{buyCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orderType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{imgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{transactionNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paySum,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{payType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{realPayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{classTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{storeAddrId,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{storeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{classDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{payTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{finish,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{validityDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},#{className,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into private_class_order
privateClassOrderId,
openId,
userId,
privateClassId,
coachId,
coachName,
buyCount,
orderType,
imgUrl,
orderNo,
transactionNo,
paySum,
payType,
realPayment,
status,
classTime,
createdDate,
payTime,
finish,
validityDate,
storeAddrId,
storeName,
classDate,
price,
className,
#{privateClassOrderId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{openId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{privateClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{coachName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{buyCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{orderType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{imgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{transactionNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{paySum,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{payType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{realPayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{classTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{payTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{finish,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{validityDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{storeAddrId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{storeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{classDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{className,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update private_class_order
openId = #{openId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
privateClassId = #{privateClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
coachId = #{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
coachName = #{coachName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
buyCount = #{buyCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
energy = #{energy,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
orderType = #{orderType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
imgUrl = #{imgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
orderNo = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
transactionNo = #{transactionNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
paySum = #{paySum,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
payType = #{payType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
realPayment = #{realPayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
classTime = #{classTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
payTime = #{payTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
finish = #{finish,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
validityDate = #{validityDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
storeAddrId = #{storeAddrId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
storeName = #{storeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
classDate = #{classDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
duration = #{duration,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
className = #{className,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where privateClassOrderId = #{privateClassOrderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update private_class_order set openId = #{openId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, privateClassId = #{privateClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, coachId = #{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, coachName = #{coachName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, buyCount = #{buyCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, orderType = #{orderType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, imgUrl = #{imgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, orderNo = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, transactionNo = #{transactionNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, paySum = #{paySum,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, payType = #{payType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, realPayment = #{realPayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, classTime = #{classTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, payTime = #{payTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, finish = #{finish,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, validityDate = #{validityDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} storeAddrId = #{storeAddrId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, storeName = #{storeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, classDate = #{classDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, className = #{className,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where privateClassOrderId = #{privateClassOrderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select pco.userId, pco.coachId, pco.orderNo, pco.privateClassId as classId, pco.className, pco.imgUrl as firstImgUrl, concat(pco.realPayment,'') as paySum, pco.status, date_format(pco.createdDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdDate from private_class_order pco where pco.userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} order by pco.createdDate desc LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
select count(*) from private_class_order pco where pco.userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT pco.userId, pco.orderNo, concat(pco.realPayment,'') as realPayment, pco.status, pco.coachName, pco.classTime, pco.buyCount, pco.storeName as classRoom, (select concat(sa.province,sa.city,sa.zone,sa.storeAddrDetail) from store_address sa where sa.storeAddrId=pco.storeAddrId) as classAddress, date_format(pco.createdDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdDate, date_format(pco.payTime, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as payTime, date_format(pco.finish, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as finish, pco.privateClassId as classId, pco.className, concat(pco.price,'') as classPrice, pco.imgUrl as firstImgUrl from private_class_order pco where pco.userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and pco.orderNo = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT privateClassOrderId, openId, userId, privateClassId, coachId, coachName, buyCount, orderType, imgUrl, orderNo, transactionNo, paySum, payType, realPayment, status, className, classTime, createdDate, payTime, finish, validityDate, storeAddrId,storeName, classDate,price,className FROM private_class_order WHERE orderNo = #{orderNo}
SELECT SUM(money) FROM coach_trade_detail WHERE coachId = #{coachId} AND tradeType = 1 AND status = 1

SELECT p.buyCount, p.createdDate, p.status, p.imgUrl, p.className, concat(p.price,'') as price, p.classTime, p.payTime, p.finish, p.orderNo, concat(p.realPayment,'') as realPayment, u.nickname, s.province, s.city, s.zone, s.storeAddrDetail, s.storeName FROM private_class_order p LEFT JOIN user_info u ON u.userId = p.userId LEFT JOIN store_address s ON s.storeAddrId = p.storeAddrId WHERE p.privateClassOrderId = #{privateClassOrderId}
SELECT privateClassOrderId, orderNo, status, createdDate FROM private_class_order WHERE status = 0

select count(*) from private_class_order pco inner join private_class pc on pc.privateClassId=pco.privateClassId inner join data_map dm on dm.idxLabel=2 and dm.nextLabel=4 and dm.price=pc.classType where pco.userId=#{userId} and pco.status=1 and dm.dataName like concat('%','体验课','%')
